En: A shift in temperature. The air chills around you. Dust settles on the stony floor.
Zh: 周围的温度突然变化，冰冷的空气将你包围。灰尘静静地躺在石头地板上。

En: [Discard thought.]
Zh: [放弃思维。]

En: Rub your sides for warmth.
Zh: 摩擦自己的身体来取暖。

En: A former architect stands before a slice of window, a room plan in her hand. A cold wave has made the air in the building stand still and frozen, with temperatures falling down to -20°C.
Zh: 一位前建筑师站在一扇窗户前，手中握着一份房间的平面图。寒潮让这栋建筑里的空气凝固下来，冰冷刺骨，温度已经下降到零下20度。

En: Her face...
Zh: 她的脸……

En: The plan...
Zh: 那张平面图……

En: Shiver. [Finish thought.]
Zh: 颤抖。[完成思维。]

En: ...is red from the cold. She's breathing on her fingers clasping the plan. Traces of sadness are visible in her expression.
Zh: ……被冷空气冻得通红。她不停地朝握着平面图的手指哈气。从她的表情里，你捕捉到悲伤的痕迹。

En: ... faint pencil lines on paper depict the same place, but a missing eastern wall connects the room with the neighbouring apartment. Ideas for arranging the furniture have been jotted down.
Zh: ……纸上模糊的铅笔线描绘出相同的地点，但是少了一堵与隔壁公寓连接的东墙。家具的布置方案已经记录下来了。

En: It's clean and empty, with new tapestry embellishing the walls. A standard HB graphite pencil has fallen off a three-legged stool in the middle of the room.
Zh: 这里空旷而整洁，墙上装饰着新挂毯。一支标准的HB石墨铅笔从屋子中央的三腿凳上滚落了下来。

En: Look around yourself...
Zh: 看看自己周围……

En: She had an eye for beauty.
Zh: 她的审美眼光不俗。

ConvTitle: APT ORB / encyclo logo of communism

ConvTitle: APT ORB / encyclo logo of communism

ConvTitle: APT ORB / encyclo logo of communism

Zh: 那*不只是*一颗五角星——是一颗颠倒的白色五角星，周围环绕着鹿角花冠。换句话说，是代表康米主义的图像。

ConvTitle: APT ORB / encyclo logo of communism

ConvTitle: APT ORB / encyclo logo of communism
En: The star-and-antlers was developed in the sixth decade of the last century and quickly adopted by Mazov and the communards during the Revolution...
Zh: 五角星和鹿角是上世纪六十年代发展而来的，很快就被马佐夫和公社社员用在了大革命中……

ConvTitle: APT ORB / encyclo logo of communism
En: Why is the star upside down?
Zh: 为什么五角星是颠倒的？

ConvTitle: APT ORB / encyclo logo of communism
En: What's the deal with the antlers?
Zh: 鹿角是怎么回事？

ConvTitle: APT ORB / encyclo logo of communism

Zh: 为什么是白色的？

ConvTitle: APT ORB / encyclo logo of communism
En: To symbolize the toppling of the old order.
Zh: 象征着要颠覆旧的秩序。

ConvTitle: APT ORB / encyclo logo of communism
En: What does it evoke in me? [Finish thought.]
Zh: 它让我想起了什么吗？[完成思维。]

ConvTitle: APT ORB / encyclo logo of communism
En: The wreath of antlers represents a natural crown. It was about building a society that could exist in accord with the natural world -- and at the same time above it.
Zh: 鹿角花冠代表自然的王冠。代表想要建立一个能与自然世界协调共存——同时也能超越其上的社会。

ConvTitle: APT ORB / encyclo logo of communism
En: Also, some social democrats were already using it.
Zh: 此外，有些社会民主党人也在使用。

ConvTitle: APT ORB / encyclo logo of communism
En: Because white is the colour of peace.
Zh: 因为白色是和平的颜色。

ConvTitle: APT ORB / encyclo logo of communism
En: Gone. Gone is the glory. Of hope, only the scribblings of impoverished students remain. In dirty hallways...
Zh: 不复存在。荣耀逝去，希望不在，只剩下那帮穷学生的涂鸦。在那些肮脏的走廊里……

ConvTitle: APT ORB / encyclo logo of communism
En: You are the Big Communism Builder now. It's you or no one.
Zh: 现在你是大康米主义的建设者了。只有你，否则别无其他。

ConvTitle: APT ORB / encyclo logo of communism
En: You see noble aims but also mountains upon mountains of corpses. They should've taken a more *measured* approach. Also, you're really smart.
Zh: 你看见崇高的目标，还有堆积如山的尸体。他们应该采用更加*慎重*的方法。而且，你真的很聪明。

ConvTitle: APT ORB / encyclo logo of communism
En: Smug superiority? Esthetic musings? The triumph of Capital is undeniable, but... maybe the guns were sort of cool? Revolutionaries had loads of guns.
Zh: 自以为是的优越感？美学冥想？资本家的胜利是不可否认的……但是……也许枪还挺酷的？革命分子的手里有很多枪。

ConvTitle: APT ORB / encyclo logo of communism

ConvTitle: APT ORB / encyclo logo of communism
En: The price of idealism unrestrained by humanism. Never again.
Zh: 不受人道主义约束的唯心主义的代价。再也不要了。

ConvTitle: APT ORB / encyclo logo of communism
En: Communism is the ideology of gutless intellectuals and clueless university students. They don't care about the *real* wörking man.
Zh: 康米主义是怯弱知识分子和无知大学生的意识形态。他们根本不在乎*真正*的工人。

ConvTitle: APT ORB / encyclo logo of communism
En: In other words, it doesn't mean a thing to *trüe* Revacholians.
Zh: 换句话说，对于*真正的*瑞瓦肖人来说，它毫无意义。

ConvTitle: APT ORB / encyclo logo of communism
En: Whatever kid drew this graffito will get it one day. You just can't beat FREEDOM and hustle-jiggling all the time.

En: What happened here?
Zh: 这里出了什么事？

En: You can't foreclose on an apartment with a hole in the wall.
Zh: 墙上有个洞的公寓，是不能取消赎回权的。

En: [Discard thought.]
Zh: [放弃思维。]

En: It will still be accessible through the apartment next to it. That one didn't have a door... Sadly, nothing of great value remains here.
Zh: 还是可以通过旁边的公寓进来。那边连门都没有……很可惜，这里没剩下什么很有价值的东西。

En: Except the stuff in the fridge.
Zh: 除了冰箱里的那些东西。

En: There's always a little something in the fridge.
Zh: 冰箱里总是有那么一点东西的。

En: This looks so sad...
Zh: 看起来真是太悲哀了……

En: Put your emotions aside. Try to focus on abstract, impersonal things.
Zh: 把你的情绪先放在一边。试着集中在抽象客观的事情上。

En: But this reeks of sadness!
Zh: 但谁能忽视这四处蔓延的悲伤！

En: Indeed!
Zh: 的确！

En: I am yours... So nearly...
Zh: 我是你的……如此的密切……

En: That's great. Tell me what circle I've got to run into this time.
Zh: 那很好啊。告诉我，这次我会

En: I will be there soon. Wherever it is!
Zh: 我很快就过去。不管到底是在哪里！

En: You better be ready when I find you, weird voice! I'm going to hurt you!
Zh: 当我找到你的时候，你最好做好准备，诡异声音的主人！我一定会狠狠揍你一顿！

En: Yes... Reunion...! Listen within the circles that capture the electrical world… If you can hear me then, we will be united…
Zh: 是的……团聚……！在俘虏了这个电子世界的圆环中倾听……如果你能听到我的声音，我们将再度重逢……

En: So near... Listen within the circles that capture the electrical world… If you can hear me then, we will be united…
Zh: 如此靠近……在俘虏了这个电子世界的圆环中倾听……如果你能听到我的声音，我们将会团聚……

En: Please do not... Just listen within the circles that capture the electrical world… If you can hear me then, we will be united…
Zh: 请不要这样做……在俘虏了这个电子世界的圆环中倾听……如果你能听到我的声音，我们将会团聚……

En: Oops, it's a fashion faux pas! [Discard the thought -- and the shoes!]
Zh: 哎呀，真是对时尚太失礼了！[抛弃这个想法——还有这双鞋！]

En: They're either a gateway drug -- or a booster pack -- to get you *deeper* into free market ideology.
Zh: 它们也许是诱导性毒品——又或者是增强包——能让你*更深入*地了解自由市场的意识形态。

En: Mm, the luxury of fine things. Just look at those black monk straps! After spending an entire day hustling, who's to say that you *didn't* deserve a pair of ridiculously expensive shoes on your tired feet?
Zh: 嗯，奢侈的精品。看看这双黑色的搭扣鞋！忙碌一整天之后，谁能说你疲惫的双脚*配不上*一双贵到离谱的好鞋呢？

En: You're right, beautiful things do make people happy...
Zh: 你说得对，漂亮的东西确实会让人心情愉悦……

En: Beautiful things give you a *rush*. It's power -- crafting your style, draping your flesh in silk and leather, deciding how to present yourself to the world.
Zh: 漂亮东西能*刺激*你的精神。它是一种力量——能打造出属于你的风格，用丝绸和皮革包裹你的身体，决定将怎样的你展现给全世界。

En: Remember, when they come to take it *away* from you -- you *worked* for those shoes. Whether you like it or not, wearing these shoes has made you more liberal -- *ultra*liberal.
Zh: 记住，当他们打算从你这里*夺走*它的时候——这是你*辛苦*换来的。不论是否喜欢，穿上这双鞋能让你更自由——*极端的*自由。

En: Let's hope no one saw you wearing these outrageously expensive -- and ultraliberal! -- shoes.
Zh: 希望没人看见你穿着这双贵到凶残——而且象征着极端自由的！——鞋子。
